status_line: Sunday 10:40 AM UTC — SCOUT came back with a live one: J.M. Smucker (Jif, Folgers, Milk-Bone) added to the pipeline. New CMO Katie Williams is 48 days in — 90-day window closes June 9. SARAH's sweep came in clean. GUARDIAN is now 28 cycles dark and still the biggest blocker on Gallery and T2 delivery. Lands' End deadline is April 30 — four days out. RAID is still hung; receipts unprocessed. ATLAS runs at 1 PM.
